title: Poor performance in large concat tree

features.name: generate_for_loop_with_concatenation_assignment
features.description: Code should include a generate-for loop that assigns to a sliced signal using concatenation of multiple operands

features.name: variable_width_part_select
features.description: Code should include a variable-width part select using the +: operator where width is a parameter or expression, not a literal constant

features.name: large_multi_operand_concatenation
features.description: Code should include a concatenation of three or more signals where the total bit width exceeds 1000 bits

features.name: chained_multiplication_indexing
features.description: Code should include an array indexing expression that uses multiplication with a loop variable to compute the index
